questions.question: What did Paul say the Thessalonians' faith had become known throughout?
questions.feedback: Paul praised them because their faith was reported in Macedonia and Achaia.

questions.question: Paul said the Thessalonians turned to God from what?
questions.feedback: They turned to God from idols to serve the living and true God.

questions.question: Paul says the gospel came to the Thessalonians in word only.
questions.feedback: Paul says the gospel came not only in word but also in power and in the Holy Spirit.

questions.question: Paul constantly remembered the Thessalonians' work of faith, labor of _____, and endurance of hope.
questions.feedback: Paul remembered their work of faith, labor of love, and endurance of hope.

questions.question: The Thessalonians became imitators of Paul and of the _____.
questions.feedback: They became imitators of Paul and of the Lord, receiving the word in much affliction with joy.
